daily.today_energy: Your emotional intuition is absolutely glowing rn. The cosmos is giving you permission to trust those gut feelings and lean into your natural empathy. You're basically a human lie detector today.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, there's a sweetness in the air around your connections. Someone might be thinking about you more than you realize. Let yourself be vulnerable—it's your superpower.
daily.career: Your creative problem-solving is peak. That project or idea you've been mulling over? Today's the day to pitch it or move it forward. Your voice carries weight, even if you don't feel like it yet.
daily.health: Your body's asking for gentleness today. Honor that energy by doing something that feels nourishing rather than punishing. A walk, stretching, or just resting is totally valid and powerful.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about shedding what no longer serves you, Cancer. Venus is nudging you toward honest conversations and authentic connections. Trust your gut—it's been right all along. Time to level up.
weekly.love: Someone's been noticing you from the sidelines. Whether single or coupled up, this is your week to be vulnerable in the coolest way possible. Let people see the real you, messy feelings and all. That's where magic happens.
weekly.career: Your creative ideas are hitting different right now. Don't downplay your contributions—speak up in meetings and share what's been brewing in that brilliant mind of yours. Recognition is closer than you think.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness this week. Lean into rest without the guilt. Whether it's longer showers, journal sessions, or actually taking breaks, these moments of care are fuel, not laziness. Listen to yourself.
